name: medical clinic administration teams processing 10–20 patient records/month tool
description: For medical clinic administration teams processing 10–20 invoices/month, billing discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.

problem_solved: frequent billing discrepancies due to manual reconciliation of patient records.
features: manual data entry for patient records
